Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze the Request Input An event log from a financial services support workflow containing 3 cases C001 C002 C003 Problem Activity names are ambiguous The same name Verify Documents Call Customer is used for different actions depending on context timing Task Identify recurring activities and interpret contextual differences Rename activities to reflect context Present the revised event log Justify the naming choices

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Event Log Case by Case Case C001 Verify Documents Initial check Call Customer Context Verification incomplete requesting missing docs This is a Request for Information call Verify Documents Context Re checking after new info This is a Re verification Case C002 Verify Documents Initial check Call Customer Context Clarify account discrepancy This is an Investigation Clarification call Call Customer Context Confirm adjustments This is a Confirmation Follow up call Case C003 Verify Documents Physical check Call Customer Context Customer stepped out call to return This is a Locate Recall call Verify Documents Context Re verify after adjustment This is a Re verification

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Identify Ambiguous Activities Verify Documents Occurs at the beginning Initial Check Occurs after additional info or adjustments Re Check Distinction Initial vs Subsequent Re verification Call Customer C001 Requesting missing docs Information Request C002 first Clarifying discrepancy Investigation C002 second Confirming changes Confirmation C003 Calling a walk in customer who stepped away Recall Notification Distinction The purpose of the call varies significantly

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Strategy I need to rename these based on intent C001 Request Missing Information C002 first Clarify Account Discrepancy C002 second Confirm Adjustments C003 Recall Customer to Counter

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Drafting New Names Verify Documents First occurrence Perform Initial Document Verification Second occurrence Perform Document Re verification Call Customer C001 Request Missing Documentation via Phone C002 first Investigate Account Discrepancy via Phone C002 second Confirm Account Adjustments via Phone C003 Recall Customer to Service Counter

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The prompt says Identify activities that appear multiple times within the same case Initiate Request appears once per case Approve Request appears once per case Adjust Account appears once per case Submit Additional appears once So Verify Documents and Call Customer are the primary targets for renaming

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: I should also consider if Initiate Request should be split by channel Online vs Branch for better clarity Actually better to stick to the explicit instruction Identify activities that appear multiple times within the same case I will stick to Verify Documents and Call Customer to be safe

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Check timestamps and order must remain unchanged Check Case IDs must remain unchanged Ensure new names are descriptive but concise Ensure the justification maps back to the Additional Context column

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Self Correction on Initiate Request While it does not repeat within a case it is the same activity name across cases with different contexts Web vs Branch I will focus on the repeating ones as the priority Decision I will only rename Verify Documents and Call Customer as these are the ones explicitly repeating within cases
